calendar.matters:
Petn. To Construe "No-Contest Clause" Under 1999 Restated Trust To Exclude A Successful Contest Of The 2003 Restated Trust And 2003 Will
Off Calendar Mar-28-2006 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Jonathan Wolf appearing for respondent. Seth Skootsky appearing for petitioner. Oral arguments presented. Court is denying this petition because of the wording of the 1999 document is very specific. Sanction is not imposed. Mr. Wolf to prepare an order and he will send it to Mr. Skootsky for approval as to form. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Application For Determination That Proposed Petn
